error_signature: execute node runs entire workflow instead of single node
title: Execute node runs entire workflow instead of single node
symptom: When using the execute node feature, the entire workflow is triggered instead of just the selected node. This makes testing specific nodes inefficient.
applies_when: Trying to test a single node after a workflow run
not_this_if: No previous workflow run data available
Node is not part of a chain
root_cause: The execute node feature in n8n is designed to check the entire workflow chain. Without pinning the output node, it defaults to executing the whole workflow, which can be inefficient for testing individual nodes.
fix_steps: Identify the output node that feeds into the node you want to test
Pin the output node to lock the data in place
Use the execute node feature to run the specific node
agent_instruction: Pin the output node that feeds into your target node before executing it.
